name: Charter Hall Group
analysis: CHC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$22.9000. Trade idea: entry A$23.3900, stop A$19.7307, target A$34.3679 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
